Home › For Businesses
Employer Memberships

Better Healthcare for Your Team. Simpler Than You Think.

The Main Line is home to thousands of small businesses, independent professionals, and growing companies — many offering health insurance that costs a fortune and still leaves employees with 7-minute appointments and high copays.

Forward Family Medicine employer memberships give your team direct, unlimited access to their primary care physician — no copays, same-day availability, and a doctor who actually knows them.

Inquire About Employer Memberships Email Us Directly

Quick Contact

Reach us to discuss employer memberships for your team:

📞 (215) 645-7044
✉️ Information@forwardfamilymedicine.com

We respond within 1 business day and are happy to set up a call to discuss your team's specific needs.

The Problem

Traditional Health Insurance Wasn't Built for Your Team

⏱️ 7-minute appointments

The national average for a primary care visit. Your employees deserve better — especially for preventive care and chronic condition management.

💸 Unpredictable costs

Premiums rise every year. High deductibles mean employees avoid the doctor until things get expensive. Then the ER visit costs everyone more.

📅 3-week wait times

The average wait for a primary care appointment. Sick employees who wait get sicker, stay home longer, and cost your business more.

📋 Administrative burden

Claims, pre-authorizations, EOBs, in-network restrictions. Traditional insurance adds friction at every point of care.

How It Works

Employer Memberships at Forward Family Medicine

Employer memberships at Forward Family Medicine work simply: you pay a flat monthly per-employee fee, and your team gets unlimited direct primary care. No copays when they visit. No hoops to jump through. Just a doctor who knows them, picks up the phone, and has time for them.

Our employer plans pair seamlessly with your existing high-deductible health plan — or as a standalone benefit for companies looking to add meaningful healthcare value without replacing full insurance.

Because Dr. Lieberman is board-certified in Lifestyle Medicine, your employees also gain access to evidence-based nutrition, sleep, and stress coaching — the kind of proactive care that keeps people out of the ER and off sick days.

What Your Employees Get

  • Unlimited primary care office visits — no copay
  • Same-day and next-day appointments
  • Visits: 1–2 hours (not 7 minutes)
  • Direct phone, text & email access to their doctor
  • Preventive care and chronic disease management
  • Board-certified Lifestyle Medicine — nutrition, sleep, stress, movement
  • Wholesale lab pricing — significant cost savings
  • Specialist referral coordination
  • Telehealth visits
Who It's For

Built for Companies Like Yours

🏢

Small Businesses

Can't afford full group health insurance? DPC lets you offer a real, meaningful healthcare benefit at a predictable monthly cost.

⚖️

Professional Firms

Law firms, accounting practices, and financial services firms who want to offer premium healthcare as a retention and recruitment tool.

🌿

Wellness-Focused Employers

Companies who value employee wellbeing and want to offer lifestyle medicine alongside primary care — as a real, board-certified service.

🔧

Companies Supplementing Insurance

Already have a high-deductible plan? DPC fills the primary care gap — employees get unlimited access without touching their deductible.

The Business Case

Better Care Means Lower Costs

📉

Fewer ER Visits

Same-day primary care access means employees handle problems early — before they become expensive emergency room visits.

📅

Less Time Away

Same-day appointments, telehealth, and direct doctor access mean employees spend less time away from work managing healthcare logistics.

💊

Wholesale Medications

Employees access medications and labs at wholesale pricing — significantly below retail and often below insurance negotiated rates.

❤️

Preventive Care That Sticks

Dr. Lieberman's lifestyle medicine approach builds long-term health — reducing the chronic conditions that drive the highest healthcare costs.

Get in Touch

Ready to Talk?

Employer memberships are inquiry-based — we'll work with you to design a plan that fits your company size, existing benefits, and employee needs. There's no standard price list because there's no standard company. Reach out and we'll figure it out together.

Fill Out Our Contact Form

Or reach us directly:

Phone: (215) 645-7044

Email: Information@forwardfamilymedicine.com

Your Team Deserves a Doctor Who Has Time for Them

Contact us about employer memberships. We'll design a plan that makes sense for your company — and genuinely improves healthcare for your people.

© 2026 Forward Family Medicine. All rights reserved.

Forward Family Medicine is a Direct Primary Care practice. Membership is not insurance. We recommend pairing DPC with a high-deductible or health-sharing plan.
